scope.note: all under apps/cockpit (one WP, one journey slice)

size.note: vertical round-trip slice — server+client of one journey ship together by design (INDEX decomposition); not splittable without breaking the observable round-trip

architecture.notes: ADR-006 honoured (no new write-gate file); ADR-007 emitter-only mint via bridge; read-only gate clean; no new process-start

security.notes: scope-bound + path-normalised search (../-escape refused, verified); confirm-gated act; NFR-SEC-03 log discipline; no secrets/injection

watch: randomToken uses Math.random (same-process nonce, not a security token — acceptable, documented)
per-process orchestrator singleton (single-founder-localhost assumption, matches InFlightLock)
